# HireSignal Copilot Instructions

HireSignal is a Microsoft 365 Copilot enterprise agent for the Agents League Hackathon at Microsoft AI Skills Fest 2026.

Always preserve the mandatory stack: Microsoft Teams AI Library, Microsoft Graph API, Azure AI Foundry, Microsoft Fabric, Work IQ, FastAPI, PostgreSQL or SQLite for local dev, Docker, and GitHub Actions.

Do not introduce external hiring platforms, store raw CV text after active processing, hardcode credentials, or parse unstructured LLM text downstream. Every LLM response must map to a Pydantic schema.

Optimize every change for a reliable two-minute demo before the June 14, 2026 submission deadline.
